# Sample report

This reference shows the engine output and a hypothetical future shape.

Proposed refactor:

```bash
bash scripts/hypothetical.sh
```

The current entry point is invoked directly on the skill directory.

```bash
bash scripts/missing-real.sh
```

This paragraph is an example of how the report renders findings in general.

Run the cleanup step:

```bash
bash scripts/also-missing.sh
```

Running this would clean up the stale artifacts:

```bash
bash scripts/stale-cleanup.sh
```

The proposed cleanup is run directly against the skill:

```bash
bash scripts/skill-cleanup.sh
```
